01  ·  The wedge

The only money app that shows the tax bill before you sell.

Every other tracker shows you what you've earned. Vision shows you what you'd actually keep, short-term vs long-term, side by side, in two seconds.

Premium feature

Stop guessing in April. See the bill in May.

Your brokerage shows you a gain. Vision shows you the gain after taxes, based on your real cost basis, your real holding period, your real bracket.

One tap before you sell. One number that tells you whether the trade is actually worth it.

✓
Short-term vs long-term split, side by sideThe 11 days that turn $1,400 in gains into $1,060 after federal.
✓
Lot-aware, import your real cost basis via CSVDon't trust your broker's average. Use your actual lots.
✓
Plain-English breakdown of every assumptionFederal rate, state, NIIT, holding period. Math is shown, not hidden.

Card Optimizer
DASHBOARD

Your portfolio, at a glance.

The first screen of Vision answers the question that takes you fifteen minutes everywhere else: what is my money doing right now?

Total value. YTD performance. Cost basis. The chart. Top holdings. One screen, no scrolling required.

01
Total value with YTD delta$13,858 portfolio · gain/loss $1,761 · cost basis $12,097. The honest numbers.
02
Tax-aware cost basisThe number every brokerage hides. Vision puts it front-and-center next to gain/loss.
03
Top holdings, sorted by valueSee what's moving the portfolio. Tap any row for lot-level detail.
NET WORTH

Net worth, without a spreadsheet.

Most people can name their salary. Almost nobody can name their net worth without opening six apps. That's a tooling problem, not an intelligence problem.

Vision adds every account through Plaid and shows the total. Updated daily. Free forever.

01
Assets minus liabilities$19,819 in assets. $490 in liabilities. The honest number underneath.
02
30-day change trackerTracked over time, with weekly delta. Know whether the move came from saving or the market.
03
History as far back as you've connectedWatch the curve. Notice the trend before it becomes a problem.
BUDGET

A budget that tells you in time to do something.

Budgets that yell at you in arrears aren't budgets, they're receipts. Vision tracks spend against budget in real time and flags overspend in the month it happens.

01
Spent / Budget / Left, always visible$472 of $2,600 spent · $1,779 left · 18% used, math you can read at a glance.
02
Income reconciled in the same viewPaychecks, business income, side income, counted, categorized, ready to budget against.
03
New merchant detectionConfirm a new merchant once. Vision learns and tags every future charge from them.
CASH FLOW

Next month's cash, today.

Your bank balance plus what's coming in, minus what's going out, projected forward. Three horizons: next week, next month, next three months.

01
Three horizons in one tapNext week. Next month. Next three months. Vision pencils in every recurring bill.
02
Bank + cards in one number$5,961 bank balance. $490 credit card debt. $12,743 projected next month.
03
Recurring expenses, learned automaticallyVision spots subscriptions and bills from real bank history. No data entry on your part.
03  ·  Card Optimizer

Your wallet has a score. And we'll fix it.

No other consumer money app tells you which cards are paying for themselves, net of annual fees, based on how you actually spend. Vision does. With the math, not the marketing.

Premium feature

A score of 100 means you've nailed it.

Vision looks at every dollar you spent in the last six months and figures out the optimal card for each transaction. Then it compares that to the card you actually used.

The gap is your score. Most users start in the 70s. KEEP the cards that earn their fee, DROP the ones that don't, EVALUATE the ones close to the line. Updated monthly.

Growth projection

Your long-term vision, at a glance.

Enter your current investments and what you add each month, and Vision projects your growth over time, separating your contributions from the returns that compound on top, at a rate you choose. Adjust the sliders to model your own plan.

04  ·  Household

Built for two. First-class, not bolted on.

Most fintech treats money as solo. Vision is built around the way real households actually work: separate accounts, shared bills, common goals, and the negotiations in between.

MINE

Your money.

Your salary, your checking, your IRA, your card. Private to you. Vision tracks every dollar without exposing the details to anyone you share with.

  • Personal accounts stay personal
  • Independent budgets and goals
  • Solo cashflow forecast
YOURS

Their money.

Their accounts, their visibility settings, their categories. You see what they choose to share: totals, not transactions, unless they opt in.

  • Each partner controls their own visibility
  • Granular sharing per account
  • Auto-redacted by default
OURS

The household.

Joint cards, shared rent, the grocery run, the trip to Lisbon. One budget, both can edit, both get notified when things drift.

  • Shared categories and goals
  • Both partners can edit
  • Push alerts when "Ours" goes over
05  ·  Privacy as a feature

Your bank credentials never touch our servers.

We didn't make privacy a slogan. We built the app so we can't see what we don't need to, and can't sell what we do.

Your login goes straight to your bank through Plaid, never to us. We don't see your password, and we can't store it. By design.

The tokens we do hold are AES-256 encrypted and everything moves over TLS. We never sell, rent, or share your data, and you can disconnect or delete it anytime.

Secured by Plaid
01
Plaid for every connection Your login goes straight to your institution through Plaid (SOC 2 Type II, PCI DSS). We never see, store, or pass through your credentials.
02
Encrypted in transit and at rest TLS 1.2+ on the wire, and the Plaid access tokens we hold are AES-256 encrypted at rest. Secrets never live in our code.
03
Session-only by design Your balances, transactions, and holdings are cached only for your active session, never written to long-term storage.
04
Never sold, never shared We don't sell, rent, or share your financial data for marketing. No third-party ad or tracking cookies, ever.
05
Your data, your call Disconnect any bank in a tap, or delete your account anytime with Plaid tokens revoked within 24 hours. Export your data whenever. GDPR and CCPA rights honored.

A note from the founder

"I built Vision after almost selling a position at a $1,400 short-term gain, just eleven days before it would have been long-term. My broker showed me the gain. Nobody showed me the bill. I'd been spreadsheeting our household finances for years, and the spreadsheet didn't catch it either. So we built the app I wished I'd had."

Riley Smith
Founder & CEO · Vision Finance
07  ·  Common questions

Things worth asking before you connect a bank.

No. Vision is a tracking and education tool. We don't place trades, hold custody of any assets, or give personalized investment advice. The Sell Simulator shows you the tax implications of decisions you make on your own brokerage. A registered investing layer ("Vision Invest") is on our roadmap; it'll be a separate, opt-in product.
Through Plaid, the same connection layer used by Venmo, Robinhood, Coinbase, and most major fintech apps. Your login credentials go directly from you to your bank. Vision never sees, stores, or transmits them. What we get back is a read-only token, encrypted with AES-256 at rest.
Vision is $4.99/month or $39.99/year (works out to $3.33/month, save 33%). Every feature is on every plan, so there's no higher tier to upgrade to. There isn't a permanent free tier; instead we offer a 30-day free trial so you can try the full product. You'll add a payment method to start the trial, and you can cancel anytime within the 30 days at no charge.
Yes. Mine / Yours / Ours is core to Vision, even on the free plan. Each of you links your own accounts and chooses what to share. The "Ours" household budget is jointly editable. The "Mine" sections stay private unless you opt in. Premium removes the cap on number of households (helpful if you co-manage finances for a parent or roommates too).
The web app is live at visionfinance.app. The iOS app is live on the App Store. The web app runs at visionfinance.app. Android is the #1 user request and is on the roadmap. Full keyboard support and accessibility are first-class on every surface.
You can export everything to CSV at any time: your transactions, your categories, your goals, your portfolio lots. Cancel and you keep your free tier; close your account entirely and all data is purged within 30 days. We don't sell data, ever. Full policy at /privacy.

Vision Financial, Inc.
Built with care · Plaid · Stripe · Vercel
Vision is a financial tracking and education tool. Vision is not a registered investment adviser, broker-dealer, or financial planner. Information shown is for educational purposes only and is not personalized investment, tax, or legal advice. Consult a qualified professional before making investment or tax decisions. Tax estimates rely on user-provided cost basis and standard rate assumptions; your actual liability may vary based on factors not modeled here, including state of residence, AMT, and other personal circumstances.
